title: Evol's 3D Bookshelves Enhanced
description: A simple 3D upgrade to the bookshelf block, for a more detailed vanilla feel. This Upgrade includes two new bookshelf 3D models, and textures.
body: ![Title image with Two new bookshelves popping out at the viewer, and the title "Evol's 3D Bookshelves Enhanced"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27ba265d112bae1a5928222247f5a2dc5bb543b7_0.webp)This project replaces the basic bookshelf with two unique models and textures for two totally new bookshelves, that have random weighted placement using vanilla functionality. The model and texture of the placed block, GUI, Held, and Stored Model objects.
